author: eldritch-oliver
description: Hide files and folders from the file explorer.

manifest.author: Oliver Akins
manifest.description: An Obsidian plugin that allows hiding files and folders in the built-in file explorer
manifest.name: File Hider

name: File Hider

releases.author: Eldritch-Oliver
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fixed files not hiding on obsidian initial load by @KosmosisDire in https://github.com/Oliver-Akins/file-hider/pull/27


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Oliver-Akins/file-hider/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: Eldritch-Oliver
releases.description:
Changes:
  - Feature: The system now doesn't need a `styles.css` associated with it.
  - Feature: The code now targets the `[data-path="file/path.md"]`'s parentElement to modify the inline-style instead of the CSS
  - Fix: Files within deeply nested folders did not get hidden.
  - Fix: All of the code review changes from https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/978

releases.author: Eldritch-Oliver
releases.description: The initial release for the plugin!
